arts.ttl: Sporting CP vs Arsenal: 4 key battles in crucial Champions League tie
arts.sum: The standout players and tactical battles to watch out for in Tuesday's Champions League clash between Sporting CP and Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Major Alexander Isak transfer plea sent amid Arsenal and Chelsea links as huge gesture made
arts.sum: Newcastle United fans have appeared to make a transfer plea to striker Alexander Isak, with both Arsenal and Chelsea linked with a move for the player. Arsenal are likely to be on the lookout for a new striker in the winter window, and were repeated linked with Isak over the summer.

arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres' former coaches reveal the secrets to the Sporting Lisbon star's success ahead of Arsenal clash - and outline how Mikel Arteta's side can nullify Europe's hottest property
arts.sum: ISAAN KHAN: The hands-on-face celebration coupled with goals from a multitude of avenues for Sporting Lisbon will have been enough to muddy the minds of Arsenal 's match analysts.

arts.ttl: Sporting CP vs Arsenal: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Arsenal take on Sporting CP in the Champions League on Tuesday night. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and live stream and more.

arts.ttl: Tierney returns to Arsenal squad after five-month injury
arts.sum: Scotland defender Kieran Tierney is back in Arsenal's first-team squad after five months out through injury.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta urges his Arsenal players to be 'ruthless' against Sporting Lisbon as they seek first Champions League away win in over a year
arts.sum: ISAAN KHAN IN LISBON: The Gunners, who face Sporting Lisbon on Tuesday, bounced back from a three-match winless streak to beat Nottingham Forest 3-0 on Saturday in the Premier League .

arts.ttl: Breaking: Arsenal handed huge boost for West Ham Premier League clash
arts.sum: To join our dedicated Arsenal channel, all you have to do is click this link and you can join thousands of others following our Gunners coverage! Join our Arsenal WhatsApp channel and get all the latest breaking news, opinion, podcasts and in-depth stories from football.london's dedicated Arsenal writers straight to your phone!

arts.ttl: Final Premier League table predicted with Arsenal given title verdict
arts.sum: Chelsea are predicted to finish fourth, two points behind Arsenal with 73.9 and will qualify for the Champions League. The system has looked at the numbers and predicted that Arsenal will finish third in the final Premier League table.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta breaks silence on Viktor Gyokeres amid Arsenal transfer links
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta swerved any direct reference of Viktor Gyokeres when asked about the Arsenal-linked Sporting CP striker during his press conference before the two teams meet. Therefore Gyokeres is very much the danger man Arsenal will need to stop on Tuesday night, and Arteta was posed the question what he thinks about the striker and how to silence him.

arts.ttl: Arsenal's Mikel Arteta makes subtle swipe at Man City ahead of Champions League clash
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has suggested that Manchester City should not have won the Champions League in the 2022/23 season. The last time they played in the Champions League, Ruben Amorim was still manager of the club however he has since left to join Manchester United.
